kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.serialize.Description: A serializer to use for converting data to the ORC format before storing it in Amazon S3. For more information, see [Apache ORC](https://orc.apache.org/docs/).
A serializer to use for converting data to the Parquet format before storing it in Amazon S3. For more information, see [Apache Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/documentation/latest/).
